main.note: Primary agent. Raised from $80 → $150 (Ken, 2026-05-10) — monitoring Sprint 3, review at sprint end.

business.note: Business operations agent. ~21% of platform cost.

security.note: Security scans. Should be low-cost Haiku tasks.

legal.note: Legal review agent. Infrequent, bounded tasks.

infra.note: Forge infra agent. Haiku model set 2026-05-11. Budget raised from $20 (was over-budgeted on assumption of low Sonnet use). Heartbeat frequency being investigated.

architect.note: Architecture design. May use Opus — monitor closely.

standup.note: Daily 8AM morning stand-up. Haiku + brief context.

warden-check.note: Warden policy compliance check. Haiku, tiny context.

derivedFrom.note: Budgets set from 14-day actual spend patterns (2026-04-25 to 2026-05-08). No per-agent breakdown available in cost-state.json — agent allocations are proportional estimates. Platform cap set at $200 (above 14-day avg, below p75). Ken to review and adjust after per-agent tracking is live.
